center.name: Tiritiri Matangi Island
center.summary: Tiritiri Matangi Island是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括褐鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown teal (Anas chlorotis; ) is a species of dabbling duck of the genus Anas native to New Zealand
